[[Chief/Legends|Chief]] '''Muskov''' was the leader of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Cloud Police]], which protected [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1st}}
